title: Example Product Labelled Walkthrough
subtitle: Flow continuity, UX issues, and product recommendations

summary.label: Primary risk
summary.body: The active task asks users to monitor too many things at once.

summary.label: Product direction
summary.body: Reduce live cognitive load and move detailed analysis to the result step.

pages.title: Active Task
pages.subtitle: Keep the screen focused while the user is acting.

issues.title: Too much status text during the task
issues.body: Show only the current step and stable primary action. Move detailed logs to the result page.

issues.title: Motion competes with the user's focus
issues.body: Remove decorative motion during the active task unless it directly confirms input or progress.

pages.recommendation: Design active-task screens around focus, not analysis.
